title: Asuka Kitchen Set
wikitext:
[]: Asuka Kitchen Set             Quote Post by xdiesp » Mon Dec 10, 2012 9:03 am Cheap looking chinese bootleg kitchen set toy, probably toxic. Front and back feature Asuka. Canon? No, wait a second: happy retreat? Am I dirty minded.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Dec 10, 2012 10:49 am How would a bootleg be canon? Although this is an example of the more far-fetched ones.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Dec 10, 2012 11:23 am AR-99 wrote: How would a bootleg be canon?

[]:             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Thu Dec 13, 2012 6:33 am I just know there's a "women belong in the kitchen" sexist joke waiting to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Dec 13, 2012 8:50 am Ringworm128 wrote: I just know there's a "women belong in the kitchen" sexist joke waiting to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 13, 2012 4:30 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I don't know what Anno's issue with kitchens is, but they apparently lead up to something painful.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Dec 13, 2012 4:47 pm And Shinji's cooking skills represent Anno's compensation for that infantile trauma, it makes perfect sense.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Dec 13, 2012 6:58 pm Contrast this with Misato's culinary apathy and in 2.0, Asuka and Rei's culinary ineptitude, hmm... Then again for Rei it was an excuse to have her bandaged again despite being perfectly healthy for a change. Has anyone raised the idea of bandage fetishism yet?

[]:             Quote Post by Ringworm128 » Fri Dec 14, 2012 4:58 am I wonder if there are anymore bootlegs like this.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 14, 2012 5:11 am You mean you haven't encountered New Century Skyhawk Fighter yet? There's a whole thread here -- http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11138/Evangelion-products-and-counterfeits/
